title: FluxEDA: A Unified Execution Infrastructure for Stateful Agentic EDA
authors: Zhengrui Chen, Zixuan Song, Yu Li, Qi Sun, Cheng Zhuo
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large language models and autonomous agents are increasingly explored for EDA automation, but many existing integrations still rely on script-level or request-level interactions, which makes it difficult to preserve tool state and support iterative optimization in real production-oriented environments. In this work, we present FluxEDA, a unified and stateful infrastructure substrate for agentic EDA. FluxEDA introduces a managed gateway-based execution interface with structured request and response handling. It also maintains persistent backend instances. Together, these features allow upper-layer agents and programmable clients to interact with heterogeneous EDA tools through preserved runtime state, rather than through isolated shell invocations. We evaluate the framework using two representative commercial backend case studies: automated post-route timing ECO and standard-cell sub-library optimization. The results show that FluxEDA can support multi-step analysis and optimization over real tool contexts, including state reuse, rollback, and coordinated iterative execution. These findings suggest that a stateful and governed infrastructure layer is a practical foundation for agent-assisted EDA automation.
title_zh: FluxEDA：面向有状态代理式EDA的统一执行基础设施
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型和自主智能体在电子设计自动化（EDA）自动化中的应用正受到越来越多的关注。然而，现有的许多集成方案仍依赖于脚本级或请求级的交互方式，这使得在实际面向生产的环境中难以保持工具状态，也无法有效支持迭代优化。本文提出FluxEDA，一种面向智能体EDA的统一且具有状态保持能力的基础设施架构。FluxEDA引入了基于托管网关的执行接口，支持结构化的请求与响应处理，并维持后端实例的持久化运行。这些特性使得上层智能体和可编程客户端能够通过保留的运行时状态与异构的EDA工具进行交互，而非依赖彼此隔离的shell调用。我们通过两个典型的商业后端案例对框架进行了评估：自动布线后时序工程变更（ECO）和标准单元子库优化。实验结果表明，FluxEDA能够在真实的工具上下文中支持多步骤的分析与优化，包括状态复用、回滚以及协调的迭代执行。这些结果表明，一个具备状态保持能力和管控机制的基础设施层，是实现智能体辅助EDA自动化的可行基础。

title: AutoPDR: Circuit-Aware Solver Configuration Prediction for Hardware Model Checking
authors: Guangyu Hu, Chen Chen, Xiaofeng Zhou, Jiaxi Zhang, Wei Zhang, Hongce Zhang
publish: arXiv
abstract: Property Directed Reachability (PDR) is a powerful algorithm for formal verification of hardware and software systems, but its performance is highly sensitive to parameter configurations. Manual parameter tuning is time-consuming and requires domain expertise, while traditional automated parameter tuning frameworks are not well-suited for time-sensitive verification tasks like PDR. This paper presents a circuit-aware solver configuration framework that employs graph learning for intelligent heuristic selection in PDR-based verification. Our approach combines graph representations with static circuit features to predict optimal PDR solving configurations for specific circuits. We incorporate expert prior knowledge through constraint-based parameter filtering to eliminate invalid and inefficient configurations and reduce 78% search space. Our feature extraction pipeline captures structural, functional, and connectivity characteristics of circuit topology and component patterns. Experimental evaluation on a comprehensive benchmark suite demonstrates significant performance improvements compared to default configurations and commonly-used settings. The system successfully identifies circuit-specific parameter patterns and automatically selects the most suitable solving strategies based on circuit characteristics, making it a practical tool for automated formal verification workflows.
title_zh: AutoPDR：面向硬件模型检测的电路感知求解器配置预测
abstract_zh: 属性导向可达性（Property Directed Reachability, PDR）是一种用于硬件和软件系统形式化验证的强大算法，但其性能对参数配置高度敏感。手动调参耗时且需要领域专业知识，而传统的自动化参数调优框架又难以适应PDR这类对时间敏感的验证任务。本文提出了一种面向电路的求解器配置框架，该框架利用图学习技术，在基于PDR的验证中实现智能启发式选择。我们的方法结合图表示与静态电路特征，预测特定电路的最优PDR求解配置。通过基于约束的参数过滤机制融入专家先验知识，以排除无效和低效的配置，减少78%的搜索空间。我们设计的特征提取流程能够捕捉电路拓扑结构、功能逻辑及连接关系等方面的结构、功能与连通性特征。在综合性基准测试集上的实验评估表明，与默认配置和常用设置相比，本方法显著提升了验证性能。该系统能够成功识别针对特定电路的参数模式，并根据电路特征自动选择最合适的求解策略，为自动化形式化验证流程提供了一种实用的工具。

title: Synchronous Signal Temporal Logic for Decidable Verification of Cyber-Physical Systems
authors: Partha Roop, Sobhan Chatterjee, Avinash Malik, Nathan Allen, Logan Kenwright
publish: arXiv
abstract: Many Cyber Physical System (CPS) work in a safety-critical environment, where correct execution, reliability and trustworthiness are essential. Signal Temporal Logic (STL) provides a formal framework for checking safety-critical CPS. However, static verification of STL is undecidable in general, except when we want to verify using run-time-based methods, which have limitations. We propose Synchronous Signal Temporal Logic (SSTL), a decidable fragment of STL, which admits static safety and liveness property verification. In SSTL, we assume that a signal is sampled at fixed discrete steps, called ticks, and then propose a hypothesis, called the Signal Invariance Hypothesis (SIH), which is inspired by a similar hypothesis for synchronous programs. We define the syntax and semantics of SSTL and show that SIH is a necessary and sufficient condition for equivalence between an STL formula and its SSTL counterpart. By translating SSTL to LTL_P (LTL defined over predicates), we enable decidable model checking using the SPIN model checker. We demonstrate the approach on a 33-node human heart model and other case studies.
title_zh: 用于网络物理系统可判定验证的同步信号时序逻辑
abstract_zh: 许多信息物理系统（CPS）工作在安全关键的环境中，其正确执行、可靠性和可信性至关重要。信号时序逻辑（STL）为检查安全关键的CPS提供了一个形式化框架。然而，STL的静态验证在一般情况下是不可判定的，除非采用基于运行时的方法进行验证，但这些方法存在局限性。本文提出同步信号时序逻辑（SSTL），它是STL的一个可判定片段，支持对安全性和活性属性进行静态验证。在SSTL中，我们假设信号在固定的离散时间步长（称为“节拍”）上进行采样，并提出一个称为信号不变性假设（SIH）的假设，该假设受同步程序中类似假设的启发。我们定义了SSTL的语法和语义，并证明SIH是STL公式与其SSTL对应公式等价的充分必要条件。通过将SSTL转换为LTL_P（在谓词上定义的LTL），我们实现了使用SPIN模型检测工具进行可判定的模型检测。我们在一个33节点的人类心脏模型及其他案例研究中验证了该方法的有效性。

title: Multi-target Coverage-based Greybox Fuzzing
authors: Masami Ichikawa
publish: arXiv
abstract: In recent years, fuzzing has been widely applied not only to application software but also to system software, including the Linux kernel and firmware, and has become a powerful technique for vulnerability discovery. Among these approaches, Coverage-based grey-box fuzzing, which utilizes runtime code coverage information, has become the dominant methodology. Conventional fuzzing techniques primarily target a single software component and have paid little attention to cooperative execution with other software. However, modern system software architectures commonly consist of firmware and an operating system that operate cooperatively through well-defined interfaces, such as OpenSBI in the RISC-V architecture and OP-TEE in the ARM architecture. In this study, we investigate fuzzing techniques for architectures in which an operating system and firmware operate cooperatively. In particular, we propose a fuzzing method that enables deeper exploration of the system by leveraging the code coverage of each cooperating software component as feedback, compared to conventional Single-target fuzzing. To observe the execution of the operating system and firmware in a unified manner, our method adopts QEMU as a virtualization environment and executes fuzzing by booting the system within a virtual machine. This enables the measurement of code coverage across software boundaries. Furthermore, we implemented the proposed method as a Multi-target Coverage-based Greybox Fuzzer called MTCFuzz and evaluated its effectiveness.
title_zh: 基于多目标覆盖的灰盒模糊测试
abstract_zh: 近年来，模糊测试（fuzzing）不仅被广泛应用于应用软件，还被用于Linux内核和固件等系统软件，已成为漏洞发现领域的一项强大技术。在众多方法中，基于覆盖率的灰盒模糊测试利用运行时代码覆盖率信息，已成为主流方法。传统的模糊测试技术主要针对单一软件组件，很少关注与其他软件的协同执行。然而，现代系统软件架构通常由固件和操作系统组成，它们通过明确定义的接口协同工作，例如RISC-V架构中的OpenSBI和ARM架构中的OP-TEE。在本研究中，我们探索了针对操作系统与固件协同工作的架构的模糊测试技术。具体而言，我们提出了一种新的模糊测试方法，该方法利用各协同软件组件的代码覆盖率作为反馈，相比传统的单目标模糊测试，能够更深入地探索系统行为。为了统一观测操作系统和固件的执行过程，我们的方法采用QEMU作为虚拟化环境，在虚拟机中启动系统进行模糊测试，从而实现跨软件边界的代码覆盖率测量。此外，我们已将所提出的方法实现为一种名为MTCFuzz的多目标基于覆盖率的灰盒模糊测试工具，并对其有效性进行了评估。

title: Quantum Circuit Repair by Gate Prioritisation
authors: Eñaut Mendiluze Usandizaga, Thomas Laurent, Paolo Arcaini, Shaukat Ali
publish: arXiv
abstract: Repairing faulty quantum circuits is challenging and requires automated solutions. We present QRep, an automated repair approach that iteratively identifies and repairs faults in a circuit. QRep uniformly applies patches across the circuit and assigns each gate a suspiciousness score, reflecting its likelihood of being faulty. It then narrows the search space by prioritising the most suspicious gates in subsequent iterations, increasing the repair efficiency. We evaluated QRep on 40 (real and synthetic) faulty circuits. QRep completely repaired 70% of them, and for the remaining circuits, the actual faulty gate was ranked within the top 44% most suspicious gates, demonstrating the effectiveness of QRep in fault localisation. Compared with two baseline approaches, QRep scales to larger and more complex circuits, up to 13 qubits.
title_zh: 基于门优先级的量子电路修复
abstract_zh: 修复存在故障的量子电路具有挑战性，需要借助自动化解决方案。本文提出了QRep，一种自动修复方法，能够迭代地识别并修复电路中的故障。QRep在电路上统一应用补丁，并为每个量子门分配一个可疑度评分，以反映其可能出错的程度。随后，该方法通过在后续迭代中优先处理最可疑的门，缩小搜索空间，从而提高修复效率。我们在40个（真实和合成的）故障电路上对QRep进行了评估。结果表明，QRep完全修复了其中70%的电路；对于其余未完全修复的电路，实际故障门的可疑度排名位于前44%以内，证明了QRep在故障定位方面的有效性。与两种基线方法相比，QRep能够扩展到更大、更复杂的电路，最多支持13个量子比特。

title: NPX: Automating Neuromorphic Processor Design from Spike-Based Learning to FPGA Prototyping
authors: Kyuseung Han, Hyeonguk Jang, Sukho Lee, Sung-Eun Kim, Kyudong Hwang, Jae-Jin Lee
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Neuromorphic Processor eXpress (NPX) is a framework designed to facilitate the development of lightweight neuromorphic processors. To evaluate its efficacy, we conducted a case study involving the FPGA-based implementation of a traffic sign recognition system using an NPX-generated neuromorphic processor. The prototype integrates camera input and OLED output, successfully demonstrating full functionality. This case study confirms that NPX substantially streamlines the design and deployment of efficient neuromorphic processors for embedded artificial intelligence applications.
title_zh: NPX：从基于脉冲的学习到FPGA原型的神经形态处理器设计自动化
abstract_zh: 神经形态处理器加速器（Neuromorphic Processor eXpress，NPX）是一个旨在促进轻量级神经形态处理器开发的框架。为评估其有效性，我们开展了一项案例研究，通过基于FPGA实现一个使用NPX生成的神经形态处理器的交通标志识别系统。该原型集成了摄像头输入和OLED输出，成功展示了完整的功能。该案例研究证实，NPX显著简化了面向嵌入式人工智能应用的高效神经形态处理器的设计与部署过程。

title: Power-Aware Streaming Scan Network Implementation for Improved Test Coverage and IR Drop Mitigation
authors: Praveenkumar Jayakumar, Sudhagar G
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: As integrated circuits (ICs) continue to scale in complexity and density, ensuring efficient and reliable testing becomes increasingly critical. This dissertation presents a comprehensive approach to enhancing scan-based testing methodologies through the implementation of the Streaming Scan Network (SSN). The proposed work focuses on improving test coverage and efficiency while addressing key challenges such as IR drop during the capture phase. To mitigate these issues, pipeline stages are strategically introduced at the On-Chip Controller (OCC) level, thereby reducing power-related anomalies and improving signal integrity during high-speed testing.The study also explores scalable SSN architectures that support design-for-testability (DFT) in large and hierarchical designs. By leveraging industry-standard tools such as Tessent Shell, the SSN framework is implemented, simulated, and optimized to ensure robust functionality. The methodology includes detailed verification and debugging processes to identify and resolve scan chain anomalies, ensuring accurate fault detection and diagnosis.Through architectural enhancements and tool-driven optimization, this work demonstrates significant improvements in test reliability, power efficiency, and scalability. The proposed SSN-based testing framework offers a practical and effective solution for modern IC verification, contributing to faster design closure and higher manufacturing yield.
title_zh: 面向提升测试覆盖率和降低IR压降的功耗感知流式扫描网络实现
abstract_zh:
随着集成电路（IC）在复杂性和密度上的持续提升，确保高效且可靠的测试变得愈发关键。本论文提出了一种全面的方法，通过实现流式扫描网络（Streaming Scan Network, SSN）来增强基于扫描的测试方法。该研究工作聚焦于提高测试覆盖率和测试效率，同时应对诸如捕获阶段IR压降等关键挑战。为缓解这些问题，在片上控制器（On-Chip Controller, OCC）层级战略性地引入了流水线级，从而降低与功耗相关的异常现象，并在高速测试期间改善信号完整性。

本研究还探讨了可扩展的SSN架构，以支持大型和层次化设计中的可测性设计（Design-for-Testability, DFT）。通过利用Tessent Shell等工业标准工具，实现了SSN框架的搭建、仿真与优化，以确保其功能的鲁棒性。该方法包括详细的验证与调试流程，用以识别并解决扫描链中的异常问题，从而确保精确的故障检测与诊断。

通过架构改进和工具驱动的优化，本研究在测试可靠性、功耗效率和可扩展性方面实现了显著提升。所提出的基于SSN的测试框架为现代集成电路验证提供了一种实用且高效的解决方案，有助于加快设计收敛并提高制造良率。

title: Aspo: Constraint-Aware Bayesian Optimization for Fpga-Based Soft Processors
authors: Haoran Wu, Ce Guo, Wayne Luk, Robert Mullins
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) has shown promise in tuning processor design parameters. However, standard BO does not support constraints involving categorical parameters such as types of branch predictors and division circuits. In addition, optimization time of BO grows with processor complexity, which becomes increasingly significant especially for FPGA-based soft processors. This paper introduces ASPO, an approach that leverages disjunctive form to enable BO to handle constraints involving categorical parameters. Unlike existing methods that directly apply standard BO, the proposed ASPO method, for the first time, customizes the mathematical mechanism of BO to address challenges faced by soft-processor designs on FPGAs. Specifically, ASPO supports categorical parameters using a novel customized BO covariance kernel. It also accelerates the design evaluation procedure by penalizing the BO acquisition function with potential evaluation time and by reusing FPGA synthesis checkpoints from previously evaluated configurations. ASPO targets three soft processors: RocketChip, BOOM, and EL2 VeeR. The approach is evaluated based on seven RISC-V benchmarks. Results show that ASPO can reduce execution time for the “multiply” benchmark on the BOOM processor by up to 35 % compared to the default configuration. Furthermore, it reduces design time for the BOOM processor by up to 74 % compared to Boomerang, a state-of-the-art hardware-oriented BO approach.
title_zh: Aspo：面向基于FPGA的软处理器的约束感知贝叶斯优化
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化（BO）在调整处理器设计参数方面已展现出良好的前景。然而，标准的贝叶斯优化无法支持涉及分类参数（如分支预测器类型和除法电路类型）的约束条件。此外，随着处理器复杂性的增加，贝叶斯优化的耗时也随之增长，这一点在基于FPGA的软处理器设计中尤为突出。本文提出了一种名为ASPO的新方法，该方法利用析取形式使贝叶斯优化能够处理包含分类参数的约束。与直接使用标准贝叶斯优化的现有方法不同，ASPO首次针对FPGA上软处理器设计所面临的挑战，对贝叶斯优化的数学机制进行了定制化改进。具体而言，ASPO通过一种新颖的定制化协方差核函数来支持分类参数；同时，通过在贝叶斯优化的采集函数中引入潜在评估时间的惩罚项，并复用先前配置的FPGA综合检查点，从而加速设计评估过程。ASPO面向三种软处理器：RocketChip、BOOM和EL2 VeeR，并基于七个RISC-V基准测试进行评估。实验结果表明，与默认配置相比，ASPO可将BOOM处理器在“multiply”基准测试上的执行时间最多减少35%；与当前最先进的面向硬件的贝叶斯优化方法Boomerang相比，ASPO可将BOOM处理器的设计时间最多缩短74%。

title: AI-Driven Formal Verification for Efficient and Scalable Design Validation
authors: Aparna Mohan, Sivakumar Karuppiah, Uday Ashokbhai Korat
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: As modern hardware and software designs grow increasingly complex, traditional formal verification techniques face critical challenges, including state space explosion and excessive computational cost, limiting their practical application in large-scale systems. This paper introduces a novel AI-driven formal verification framework that leverages machine learning models to intelligently guide and optimize the verification process. By predicting critical state exploration paths and automatically generating invariants, our approach significantly reduces the verification time and memory usage compared to conventional methods. We integrate a reinforcement learning agent with symbolic model checking, enabling adaptive decision-making that prioritizes relevant design regions while pruning irrelevant paths. Extensive experiments on benchmark hardware designs demonstrate up to 60% improvement in verification speed and substantial scalability gains without compromising correctness guarantees. The proposed method bridges the gap between rigorous formal guarantees and practical scalability, offering a transformative solution for efficient and automated design validation in the era of complex system development.
title_zh: 面向高效可扩展设计验证的AI驱动形式化验证
abstract_zh: 随着现代硬件和软件设计日益复杂，传统的形式化验证技术面临着诸如状态空间爆炸和计算成本过高等关键挑战，限制了其在大规模系统中的实际应用。本文提出了一种新型的人工智能驱动的形式化验证框架，该框架利用机器学习模型智能地引导并优化验证过程。通过预测关键的状态探索路径并自动生成不变式，我们的方法相比传统方法显著减少了验证所需的时间和内存消耗。我们将强化学习代理与符号模型检测相结合，实现了自适应决策，优先处理设计中的关键区域，同时剪除无关路径。在多个基准硬件设计上的大量实验表明，该方法在不牺牲正确性保证的前提下，验证速度提升了高达60%，并显著增强了可扩展性。所提出的方法弥合了严格形式化保证与实际可扩展性之间的鸿沟，为复杂系统开发时代下的高效、自动化设计验证提供了一种变革性的解决方案。

title: High Level Synthesis Design for Soft-Input GRAND
authors: Tuomas Aaltonen, Mikko Valkama, Syed Mohsin Abbas
publish: 2025 59th Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
abstract: Guessing Random Additive Noise Decoding (GRAND) is a universal channel code decoder for short linear block codes. GRAND can be implemented efficiently on hardware and features both hard-input and soft-input variants. Hardware implementations based on GRAND range from those that employ sequential error pattern generation to reduce resource consumption at the expense of higher decoding latency to those that employ parallel error pattern generation to reduce decoding latency at the expense of higher resource utilization. In this work, we present a soft-input Ordered Reliability Bits GRAND (ORBGRAND) hardware implementation framework based on High-Level Synthesis (HLS). The proposed HLS-based methodology simplifies Design Space Exploration (DSE) for ORBGRAND hardware implementations targeted at applications with varying constraints on decoding latency and resource utilization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first-of-its-kind HLS-based soft-input ORBGRAND hardware implementation framework, and the source code for the proposed framework is provided under a permissive open-source license.
title_zh: 软输入GRAND的高层次综合设计
abstract_zh: 猜测随机加性噪声译码（GRAND）是一种适用于短线性分组码的通用信道编码译码器。GRAND 可以高效地在硬件上实现，并具有硬输入和软输入两种形式。基于 GRAND 的硬件实现方案，从采用串行错误模式生成以降低资源消耗（但增加译码延迟），到采用并行错误模式生成以减少译码延迟（但增加资源占用），种类多样。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于高级综合（HLS）的软输入有序可靠性比特 GRAND（ORBGRAND）硬件实现框架。所提出的基于 HLS 的方法简化了针对不同译码延迟和资源使用约束应用场景下的 ORBGRAND 硬件实现的设计空间探索（DSE）。据我们所知，这是首个基于 HLS 的软输入 ORBGRAND 硬件实现框架，且该框架的源代码已通过宽松的开源许可证公开提供。

title: Identifying Sat Resilient Blocks Through LUT Switching Analysis for Breaking Compound Logic Locking Schemes
authors: Binbin Wang, Xinmu Wang, Xinyu Zhang, Shibo Tang, Huisi Zhou, Wei Hu
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Logic locking is an effective approach for protecting integrated circuits against security threats such as Intellectual Property (IP) piracy and malicious design modifications. To defeat SAT attacks, state-of-the-art locking schemes, which are typically constructed using point-function that remains constant when the correct key is applied, while producing a wrong output only under a specific input pattern if an incorrect key is provided. Although this significantly increases the effort required for SAT attack, it introduces a new vulnerability that can be exploited to discover SAT-resilient blocks. Our observation is that pointfunction can lead to control signals, which exhibit significantly lower switching probability and yield clues for identifying anti-SAT cones. This work aims to reveal such clues at the level of FPGA netlist, where switching behavior characteristics can be quantified using the initialization vectors of Look-up-Tables (LUTs). We leverage the switching behavior measurements of LUTs to pinpoint signals with extremely low switching activity to locate control signals associated with SAT-resilient blocks. By forcing the identified control signals to a constant value, the protective function of the SAT-resilient blocks can be neutralized. We validate our attack method on locked circuits with anti-SAT enhancement. Experimental results on six compound logic locking schemes yield an average attack success rate of 99.6% and 100% key recovery rate for each neutralized circuit.
title_zh: 通过LUT切换分析识别抗SAT弹性模块以破解复合逻辑锁定方案
abstract_zh: 逻辑锁定是一种有效的方法，用于防范知识产权（IP）盗版和恶意电路设计修改等安全威胁。为了抵御SAT攻击，目前最先进的锁定方案通常基于点函数构造：当输入正确密钥时，电路功能保持正常；而当密钥错误时，仅在特定输入模式下产生错误输出。尽管这种方法显著增加了实施SAT攻击的难度，但也引入了新的漏洞，可被利用来发现抗SAT攻击的逻辑模块。我们观察到，点函数可能导致某些控制信号具有极低的翻转概率，从而为识别抗SAT逻辑锥提供了线索。本文旨在从FPGA网表层面揭示此类线索，其中可通过查找表（LUT）的初始化向量量化信号的翻转行为特征。我们利用LUT的翻转行为测量结果，精确定位翻转活动极低的信号，以识别与抗SAT模块相关的控制信号。通过将这些识别出的控制信号强制置为固定值，即可中和抗SAT模块的保护功能。我们在具有抗SAT增强机制的锁定电路上验证了所提出的攻击方法。针对六种复合逻辑锁定方案的实验结果表明，平均攻击成功率达到99.6%，每条被中和电路的密钥恢复率均达到100%。

title: Single-Event and Dose Effects in 28nm FD-SOI Advanced Interface Bus Chiplet Interconnect
authors: Antoine Rouget, Adrian Evans, Fady Abouzeid, Guillaume Bascoul, Victor Malherbe, Gwenvael Le-Bars, Philippe Roche, Fabien Clermidy
publish: IEEE Transactions on Nuclear Science
abstract: Chiplet technology for 2.5-D/3-D integration is being rapidly adopted, including in mission critical applications. We present a study of the radiation sensitivity of a prototype Advanced Interface Bus (AIB) chiplet die-to-die interface in 28nm Fully Depleted Silicon On Insulator (FD-SOI) technology. The Single Event Effect (SEE) sensitivity was evaluated first using fault injection simulations and these results were compared with those obtained using alpha particles and a pulsed-laser, which enabled us to identify the most sensitive regions. Due to the large number of flip-flops in the interface, there is a significant cross-section, although the majority of faults manifest themselves as single-bit data-upsets. The effect of the dose deposited by the alpha particles was also studied.
title_zh: 28纳米FD-SOI先进接口总线芯粒互连中的单粒子效应与剂量效应
abstract_zh: 用于2.5-D/3-D集成的芯粒（Chiplet）技术正在迅速普及，包括在任务关键型应用中。本文介绍了一项针对采用28纳米全耗尽型绝缘体上硅（FD-SOI）技术的先进接口总线（AIB）芯粒芯片间接口原型的辐射敏感性研究。我们首先通过故障注入仿真评估了其单粒子效应（SEE）敏感性，并将结果与使用α粒子和脉冲激光的实验结果进行对比，从而确定了最敏感的区域。由于该接口中存在大量触发器，其敏感截面较大，但大多数故障表现为单比特数据翻转。此外，还研究了α粒子沉积剂量的影响。

title: From Errors to Solutions: LLM-Powered Command Scripting for FPGA Cad Tools
authors: Mohamed A. Elgammal, Vaughn Betz
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Computer-aided design (CAD) tools provide hundreds or even thousands of options that control various optimizations throughout the design flow. While this flexibility is powerful, it requires significant experience to be familiar with those options and effectively utilize them. For example, when a design fails, in many cases errors can be resolved by adjusting the CAD tool options rather than modifying the design itself. In this work, we propose VPR-LLM, a tool that utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate error resolution in the open-source FPGA CAD tool Verilog-to-Routing (VTR) by modifying the command-line options used to run the tool. VPRLLM parses error logs, VTR help messages, and documentation, then utilizes an LLM to generate modified command-line options that resolve the issue. VPR-LLM supports various LLM models and prompting techniques. All these models and techniques are evaluated and compared in terms of efficiency and cost. To evaluate our method, we proposed a dataset of 26 VTR run failures spanning five distinct error categories. The proposed technique successfully resolved 80 % of the cases without requiring any fine-tuning to the LLM model, demonstrating the effectiveness of VPR-LLM. This work represents an initial step toward AI-assisted debugging in CAD flows, where LLMs can enhance productivity by automatically identifying and correcting tool configurations.
title_zh: 从错误到解决方案：基于大语言模型的FPGA设计工具命令脚本自动化
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助设计（CAD）工具提供了数百甚至数千种选项，用于控制设计流程中的各种优化。尽管这种灵活性非常强大，但要熟悉这些选项并有效利用它们，需要丰富的经验。例如，当设计失败时，很多时候可以通过调整CAD工具的选项而非修改设计本身来解决问题。在本研究中，我们提出了VPR-LLM，这是一种利用大语言模型（LLM）的工具，通过修改命令行选项来自动化解决开源FPGA CAD工具Verilog-to-Routing（VTR）中的错误。VPR-LLM能够解析错误日志、VTR帮助信息和相关文档，并利用大语言模型生成可解决该问题的修改后命令行选项。VPR-LLM支持多种LLM模型和提示技术，并对这些模型和方法在效率和成本方面进行了评估与比较。为验证我们的方法，我们构建了一个包含26个VTR运行失败案例的数据集，涵盖五种不同的错误类别。实验结果表明，所提出的技术在无需对LLM模型进行任何微调的情况下，成功解决了80%的案例，证明了VPR-LLM的有效性。本工作是迈向人工智能辅助CAD流程调试的初步尝试，展示了大语言模型通过自动识别和修正工具配置来提升设计效率的潜力。

title: Power, delay Optimized MBIST Controller Architecture using March Algorithms
authors: Dhruv Sharma, Abhijit Asati
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: Memory Built in Self-Test (MBIST) is useful detecting faults in System on Chip (SOC) embedded memories. The MBIST help in detecting these fault with marginal increase in circuit area. This research focuses on the MBIST controllers which are designed using the finite state machine (FSM) based architecture for the five different MARCH algorithms to detect all possible functional faults. The MBSIT design consists of a controller, address generator, comparator and memory. The 16-bit memory is divided into sixteen banks, each for one bit and having 10-bit address. The modeling of the MBIST and the functional fault is done using Verilog HDL and pre verification for fault detection is performed using simulation. The synthesis results MBIST controllers are optimized for speed, power and power delay product (PDP) using Genus synthesis tool. Further, we compared their results, such as area, power consumption and delay etc.
title_zh: 采用March算法的功耗与延迟优化的MBIST控制器架构
abstract_zh: 存储器内置自测试（MBIST）在检测片上系统（SoC）中嵌入式存储器的故障方面非常有效，且仅需增加少量电路面积即可实现故障检测。本研究聚焦于基于有限状态机（FSM）架构设计的MBIST控制器，采用五种不同的MARCH算法，以检测所有可能的功能性故障。MBIST设计包括控制器、地址生成器、比较器和存储器。该设计中的16位存储器被划分为16个存储体，每个存储体对应1位，地址宽度为10位。MBIST及功能故障的建模采用Verilog HDL实现，并通过仿真完成故障检测的前期验证。使用Genus综合工具对MBIST控制器进行综合，优化其速度、功耗以及功耗延迟积（PDP）。此外，我们还比较了这些控制器在面积、功耗和延迟等方面的性能结果。

title: FPGAs with FABulous – Framework and Chips
authors: Dirk Koch, Myrtle Shah, King Lok Chung, Jonas Kuenstler, Marcel Jung, Jakob Ternes, Asma Mohsin, Gennadiy Knis
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: FABulous is an easy usable, yet powerful and complete eFPGA (embedded FPGA) Framework covering all aspects of an eFPGA ecosystem. FABulous eFPGAs had shown good area density in both standard-cell and custom cell flows and the framework allows various customizations, including the integration of custom primitives, I/O cells, or complex blocks like CPUs cores or ADCs. So far, more than 10 chips containing FABulous eFPGAs had been designed in technology nodes ranging from 28-180 nm by seven different universities. This demo shows how embedded FPGAs (eFPGAs) can be 1) specified, 2) verified and tested, 3) integrated into an ASIC, and 4) programmed in Verilog or VHDL using the all open FABulous eFPGA framework. Moreover, the demo will showcase two boards featuring FABulous FPGAs, including the first FABulous open-everything FPGA.
title_zh: 采用FABulous框架和芯片的FPGA
abstract_zh: FABulous 是一个易于使用且功能强大、完整的嵌入式 FPGA（eFPGA）框架，涵盖 eFPGA 生态系统的各个方面。FABulous 的 eFPGA 在标准单元和定制单元流程中均表现出良好的面积密度，该框架支持多种定制化功能，包括集成自定义原语、I/O 单元或 CPU 核心、ADC 等复杂模块。迄今为止，已有七所不同大学在 28 至 180 纳米工艺节点上设计了超过 10 款包含 FABulous eFPGA 的芯片。本次演示将展示如何利用完全开源的 FABulous eFPGA 框架实现：1）eFPGA 的规格定义；2）验证与测试；3）集成到专用集成电路（ASIC）中；以及 4）使用 Verilog 或 VHDL 进行编程。此外，演示还将展示两款搭载 FABulous FPGA 的开发板，其中包括全球首款完全开放的 FABulous FPGA。

title: Energy-Efficient Edge-AI VLSI Architecture for Quantized DNN-Based Real-Time Atrial Fibrillation Detection in Wearables
authors: A. Vidhya, J S Leena Jasmine
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Emerging Trends in Computing and Communication (ETCOM)
abstract: Accurate and energy-efficient detection of atrial fibrillation (AF) is essential for continuous cardiac monitoring in wearable ECG devices. This paper proposes an Edge-AI accelerated quantized deep neural network (Q-DNN) VLSI architecture optimized for ultra-low-power and real-time AF detection. The architecture integrates an integer-only computation flow, a custom systolic-style PE array, banked on-chip SRAM, and a hardware-aware quantization strategy to minimize resource usage and memory bandwidth. A unified co-design approach is adopted, spanning model quantization, operator mapping, timing-driven hardware scheduling, and pipelined dataflow optimization. Experimental evaluation using the MIT-BIH AFIB database shows that the proposed Q-DNN achieves <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{9 8. 4 \%}$</tex> accuracy, <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1. 2 ~ m W}$</tex> power consumption, and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1. 8}$</tex> ms latency, outperforming baseline CNN, LSTM, MobileNetV2, and classical ML models. FPGA/ASIC synthesis and Model Sim simulation validate the architecture's efficiency, robustness, and suitability for always-on wearable health monitoring. The proposed VLSI design provides a scalable foundation for next-generation low-power edge-AI ECG analytics.
title_zh: 面向可穿戴设备中基于量化DNN的实时心房颤动检测的节能边缘AI超大规模集成电路架构
abstract_zh: 心房颤动（AF）的准确且节能检测对于可穿戴式心电图（ECG）设备中的连续心脏监测至关重要。本文提出了一种基于边缘人工智能（Edge-AI）加速的量化深度神经网络（Q-DNN）超大规模集成电路（VLSI）架构，专为超低功耗和实时AF检测而优化。该架构采用纯整数计算流程、定制的类脉动处理单元（PE）阵列、分块片上SRAM以及硬件感知的量化策略，以最小化资源占用和内存带宽需求。设计采用统一的协同优化方法，涵盖模型量化、算子映射、时序驱动的硬件调度以及流水线数据流优化。基于MIT-BIH AFIB数据库的实验评估表明，所提出的Q-DNN实现了98.4%的准确率，功耗仅为1.2 mW，延迟低至1.8毫秒，在性能上优于基准CNN、LSTM、MobileNetV2及传统机器学习模型。FPGA/ASIC综合与ModelSim仿真验证了该架构的高效性、鲁棒性及其适用于持续运行的可穿戴健康监测系统。所提出的VLSI设计为下一代低功耗边缘AI心电分析提供了可扩展的技术基础。

title: Design and Image Encryption Implementation of High Performance and Resource-Efficient AES-128 Encryption Architecture
authors: Deepika Ben Thakor, Jeetendra Singh, Balwinder Raj
publish: 2025 IEEE 19th International Conference on Industrial and Information Systems (ICIIS)
abstract: This paper presents an optimized hardware implementation of the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES-128) encryption algorithm, specifically designed to minimize resource consumption while achieving high throughput. Key optimizations include a fully parallel SubBytes operation utilizing 16 simultaneous S-boxes, runtime key derivation, and a loop-iterated architecture for round execution. This approach enhances processing speed while maintaining hardware efficiency. Functional correctness was rigorously verified using the NIST FIPS-197 standard test vectors, confirming reliable encryption and decryption for all specified cases. The implemented AES architecture achieves a throughput of 4.92 Gbps at 384.6 MHz on a Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA, encrypting 128-bit blocks in 11 clock cycles. Post-synthesis results demonstrate exceptional resource efficiency: utilization rates were 2.14% for Slice LUTs, 1.05% for registers, and 13.7% for BRAM. I/O utilization reached 96.25%, underscoring the design’s compact footprint. To demonstrate practical application, the design was adapted for image processing, successfully encrypting and decrypting a 128×128 pixel grayscale image. The encrypted output exhibited characteristic random noise, while the decrypted image perfectly reconstructed the original. These findings validate the design’s suitability for deploying AES-128 on FPGAs in secure, real-time embedded systems, IoT devices, and defense communication networks.
title_zh: 高性能、资源高效型AES-128加密架构的设计与图像加密实现
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种针对高级加密标准（AES-128）加密算法的优化硬件实现方案，旨在最小化资源消耗的同时实现高吞吐量。关键优化措施包括：采用16个并行S盒实现完全并行的SubBytes操作、支持运行时密钥推导，以及采用循环迭代结构执行加密轮次。该方法在保持硬件高效性的同时显著提升了处理速度。功能正确性通过NIST FIPS-197标准测试向量进行了严格验证，确认了在所有指定情况下加密和解密的可靠性。在Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA上实现的AES架构在384.6 MHz主频下达到了4.92 Gbps的吞吐率，仅需11个时钟周期即可完成一个128位数据块的加密。综合后的结果显示其资源利用效率极高：Slice LUT占用率为2.14%，寄存器占用率为1.05%，BRAM占用率为13.7%。I/O资源利用率达到96.25%，体现了该设计紧凑的硬件占用面积。为验证实际应用能力，本设计被应用于图像处理，成功实现了对一幅128×128像素灰度图像的加密与解密。加密结果呈现出典型的随机噪声特征，而解密图像则完美还原了原始内容。研究结果证明，该设计适用于在FPGA上部署AES-128，可广泛应用于安全实时嵌入式系统、物联网设备及国防通信网络中。

title: Design and Verification of Gray Coded FSM based 3D NoC Router using Verilog HDL
authors: Yadvendra Prasad Dwivedi, Somesh Kumar
publish: 2025 IEEE 1st International Conference on Smart Innovations in Systems, Infrastructure, Mechanical, Power, AI and Computing Technologies (SISIMPACT)
abstract: As transistor dimensions shrink and operating frequencies rise, conventional on-chip interconnects like point-to-point and shared buses struggle to meet the scalability, latency, and energy efficiency demands of modern multi-core systems. Network-on-Chip (NoC) provides a structured and scalable communication paradigm to overcome these limitations. In this work, we present a 3D NoC router design based on a Gray coded Finite State Machine (FSM) to minimize power consumption by reducing switching activity. The FSM uses Gray coding to ensure that only one bit changes during state transitions. The proposed architecture is verified through functional simulation and synthesized using FPGA platforms. Comparative analysis shows significant improvements in logic utilization and power consumption over existing 2D and 3D NoC router architectures.
title_zh: 基于格雷码有限状态机的三维NoC路由器的Verilog HDL设计与验证
abstract_zh: 随着晶体管尺寸的缩小和工作频率的提高，传统的片上互连方式（如点对点连接和共享总线）在可扩展性、延迟和能效方面难以满足现代多核系统的需求。片上网络（NoC）提供了一种结构化且可扩展的通信范式，能够克服这些局限性。本文提出了一种基于格雷码有限状态机（FSM）的三维NoC路由器设计，通过降低切换活动来最小化功耗。该FSM采用格雷编码，确保状态转换时仅有一位发生变化。所提出的架构通过功能仿真进行了验证，并在FPGA平台上完成了综合。对比分析表明，与现有的二维和三维NoC路由器架构相比，该设计在逻辑资源利用率和功耗方面均有显著改善。
